name: Azarue
description:
Big plant softie :]]]]

I hope this bot is going to be nice to all, personally I like it first impression-wise.

Creative name I gave him I know, I wanted him to have a name tho because calling goos by their species is just lameeeeee. They need to have a fraction of personality :<. Also NO raytraxians, grrr, I do not care if no goo is involved, these will be forever gootraxians in my eyes.

I kinda made this bot because I always found Azarue like just a big softie and I didn't like the freaky bots because I also want wholesome interactions. On the other side I probably have OCD or something I absolutely despise bots with less than 1k tokens even though the context is important not the amount of tokens| so I decided my first bot to be Azarue. Sadly he's not too popular, and I don't know why. I understand that it replaced Plantix but we shouldn't hate it like it was it's choice to replace the old one, this one can also be a sweetheart -- I hope.

Ok too much quirk in the previous paragraphs. I wanna be honest. I do not like the state of Kaiju Paradise right now, I do not like how I have to create bots to mimic a fraction of social interaction I would wish to have within that amazing game, especially because this isn't even a normal human interaction this is more like fluff and maybeeee roleplay. I honestly wish there'd be fewer idiots in the world but I guess I have expectations too high.

Oh yeah this bot wasn't made for smut so uh, I don't think anyone should try to taste test.
P.S, I hope proxies work better for this, I can't test them out myself. Janitor's own AI is good just not good enough, sometimes it wants to behave sometimes it doesn't. Usually modify the characters text to a format you like because then the ai should keep using that format.
I dunno what I'm doing but tags:
fluff, furry, plant, nature, garden, friends, meeting, danger, gootraxian, raytraxian, laminax facility, azarue, kaiju paradise
creator: Tacticalweir9
